productDisplayName: Deni Yo Men Blue Washed Slim Fit Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans with a washed and distressed look made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, double patch pocket detail on the right front pocket, comfortable waist with belt loops and brand patch at the back, contrast stitch detailing, bright rivet buttons, embedded branding on the front right pocket with metal button and zipper closure on the front. Fit Slim fit Regular rise Wash care Wash inside out separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade The manually treated denim with its heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from Deni-yo, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
